name: PaymentAttributionAndPoolOperationContracts
description: Exact typed operation contracts for instrument, cardholder, pool catalogues, transaction corrections, and explicit reconciliation carry-forward results.
schema_def: Instrument, cardholder, and pool create/get/list/rename/archive/reactivate use stable local IDs, owner labels, attributable lifecycle, idempotency, and RESTRICT history. Instrument accepts optional account association and masked suffix only. transaction.attribution.assign/correct and transaction.pool.assign/correct set independent current values and append history. Reconciliation-only carry_forward results expose sourceTransactionId, replacementTransactionId, decisionId, and the appended attribution/pool event IDs; callers cannot invoke carry_forward directly. Stable errors cover missing/archived catalogue items, inactive transaction, same-as-active correction, absent projection, masked identifier validation, pool cardinality, stale source projection, and replay conflict. No operation accepts provider wording or transport metadata.
